name: The White House
subject: The Current Tax Plan is a Disaster
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=65ef4f52bf7947ff266cb65c38d0424e39027e9019018adbd8a4fc25e6eb7e111005d3a043ea414d88081593a8ad5fc7c9b1194a2323d972

The current tax plan is a disaster and needs to be reformed for all Americans. President Donald J. Trump is committed to bringing historic tax relief to the American people based on four key ideas – cutting taxes for every day Americans, simplifying the tax code, giving business the competitive edge, and investing in America. Today, President Trump is traveling to Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, to deliver this message on tax reform to the American Trucker Association.

-------------

President Trump Approves Emergency Declaration for California Wildfires
Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=65ef4f52bf7947ffd56eb45d510e3a1b88c9c604926145b5c5c0d5fd243abe72a9fb1e3ec7d8b9295556d6f763502954054f6d2093d8fa85
declared that a major disaster exists in the State of California and ordered Federal aid to supplement State and local recovery efforts in the areas affected by wildfires beginning on October 8, 2017, and continuing.

While in California on Tuesday, Vice President Mike Pence received a briefing at the Sacramento Office of Emergency Services on the California wildfires. “To California, we say through this declaration: We are with you, our prayers are with you, and we will be with you every day until we put the fires out and stand with these families to rebuild these communities. That’s our pledge to each one of you today,” said the Vice President.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=65ef4f52bf7947ff2b2a10c9d87ca4ec2550c3ab97ecea4e946e9efd4d4efc5128c53c4ea305a36f818a8087e9e6d20144359ea768402afd
Watch the Vice President's full remarks

First Lady Melania Trump Visits Infant Recovery Center for Prenatal Drug Exposure
Yesterday, First Lady Melania Trump traveled to West Virginia to visit Lily’s Place, the Nation’s first nonprofit infant recovery center for prenatal drug exposure. The First Lady was joined by Kellyanne Conway, Senior Counselor to the President, and Dr. Elinor McCance-Katz, Assistant Secretary for Mental Health and Substance Use at the Department of Health and Human Services. All three participated in a roundtable discussion with staff followed by a tour of the facility.

The First Lady stated, “It is my hope that we can find ways to create more of the opportunities afforded by places like Lily’s Place, so that we can continue to help infants and children grow into happy, healthy adults.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=65ef4f52bf7947ffcb2801511fad2150ba04e694b3c980b4c376c18f0e9510d2fb5c15b741019ebab9c2103b9e7dd8be9b8b22562f8787ce
Read more

Pittsburgh Penguins Visit the White House
On Tuesday, President Trump proudly welcomed the 2017 Stanley Cup Champions, the Pittsburgh Penguins, to the East Room of the White House. The President entered the cheering room with First Lady Melania Trump and Penguins co-owners Ron Burkle and Mario Lemieux. President Trump commended the Penguins, stating they “embody the values of dedication, discipline, and hard work,” and praised those same qualities in the first responders aiding both in the aftermath of the Las Vegas shooting and the fires consuming Northern California.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=72e3370fc8523be5d96e05ad8522d3f8a3292034d14a04c4fdd4b3bcf5c041d3d84f196a501ac818c0978eb68fc974152722f635013abc66
See more

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump welcomes the 2017 Stanley Cup Champions, the Pittsburgh Penguins to the White House | October 10, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS AND VP TODAY

Today, the President and First Lady welcome the Prime Minister of Canada, Justin Trudeau, and Mrs. Gregoire Trudeau to the White House. Later, the President will travel to Pennsylvania where he will deliver remarks on tax reform.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=65ef4f52bf7947ff00f66f1b21b7a26abc1c4c9face21ead23e27f265d5fce4543b11143a46780a1a07ec5331cbf8c3051a73d195c5826ef
Watch live at 5:45pm ET.

In honor of Hispanic Heritage Month, Vice President Mike Pence will host an event today at the Naval Observatory.

COMING UP

Later this week, the President will deliver remarks at the 2017 Values Voter Summit in Washington, D.C.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=65ef4f52bf7947ff8384501876a7e1d37647c3ec0772296c2ea430b46c9275d79c3992fbc551c620db754c37fdce989fb4d2ded0ec879cc6
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=72e3370fc8523be57ff1ea6e50cb59762672fac1654fc974b29515dfd10d4261db43d23b1d71f4dea3e4f04b8190dcc48f5a3d187e371336
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4bf6456a2b77a6d4a264845a4740be3ab1b84b5575439b27001b1c73cbffbb27913b48879243da62d51369ba10e4c3980
Unsubscribe

name: Democrats.org
subject: The GOP is tearing Obamacare apart, Derek
body:
Protect affordable health care.
---
**Trump is doing everything he can to sabotage the Affordable Care Act. Pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats who will fight to save affordable health care.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523b49/4067b0a/3b37cce50/7e653095/2879012834/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171011_joc_v2s1&source=em_20171011_joc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171011_joc_v2s1")**

Republicans keep failing to repeal Obamacare, but that doesn't mean that they've given up trying to take away our health care, Derek.

Instead, they've resorted to sabotage.

They've spent taxpayer dollars intended to help people sign up for coverage on advertisements advocating for Obamacare's repeal. Trump himself has consistently threatened to cut off subsidy payments to insurers, which would throw the system into chaos and has already contributed to premium increases. And now they've left the law's outreach groups without funding to help young and vulnerable people get covered.

They want to tear Obamacare down from the inside and deliberately hurt Americans who need health care. We have to stop them.

Pitch in $10 or whatever you can right now to expose this sabotage and help elect Democrats who will protect affordable health care.

Peter,

We have a once-in-a-lifetime chance to overhaul the tax code and end the rigged economy that benefits the wealthy and special interest groups.

And Peter, I am personally calling on you to show your support.
**If you support Pro-American Tax Cuts:**
[ADD YOUR NAME](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7d29ddf27bd60da22db3c64045747d4731442f5e430645946c7f580f153e89ae1270e72a2aaeb00f485a65a24d5b7700)
_This is not just**' tax cuts' ** - it is much more than that._

This is about hardworking patriots like you keeping more of your hard-earned money in your pockets, and it's about the **REAL CHANGE** Americans deserve.

Our plan focuses on...
* Tax relief for middle-class families and small businesses
* Simple "postcard" filing for the majority of Americans
* Ending incentives to ship jobs, capital, and tax revenue overseas
* Closing special interest loopholes for a fairer, broader system

**The time is now.**

To show your support, **[please add your name to support Pro-American Tax Cuts today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7d29ddf27bd60da2ec4900580a8c104c392241fef2b9249798becce0c6735120cfb84c0911d15fa1e5a674ab2ac4c8dd)**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: About that GOP tax reform plan:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
In a Budget Committee meeting last week, my colleagues and I dove into the GOP budget, which paves the way for an upcoming tax reform plan.

From the limited information that has been released, early indications were that President Trump's plan would actually raise taxes on working families. I was hoping that wouldn't be the case -- but from the few details I've now seen, I have serious concerns. Here are some of them:

* The tax cuts outlined would save **more money for the wealthy at the expense of the middle class.** Middle income folks would get only about 8 percent of the total benefit \-- that's no "middle class miracle" like we were promised.
* This plan eliminates the state and local deductions that families across Virginia rely on -- **an average of $11,288 that Virginia households would be losing out on.**
* And if all that weren't enough, the plan completely blows up the debt. These tax cuts would **increase the deficit by $1.5 trillion** over the next decade.

It's not that I am against any tax reform -- I am all for a plan that helps families, creates jobs, and makes our small businesses more competitive. **But this plan doesn't do any of that.**

Bottom line: The GOP tax reform plan would lower the tax rate for the top earners in our country only to raise the tax rate for the lowest earners. That's just plain unfair.

**I want to hear from you -- what do you think of this plan? What do you want to see in a tax reform plan going forward?**

**[Click here to fill out a quick, one-question survey and share your thoughts with me and my team.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BghicwMcEdr8aySRteNO2HjzVTmxdVBJ)**

Thanks -- talk soon,

Tim Kaine

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Join us on November 7!
body:
Hi Peter,
Does it seem like things are just crazy and busy all the time? I know it feels that way for me. I must constantly remind myself that in the tyranny of the urgent, I need to intentionally pursue the important.
Even in a country founded on the principle of “We, the people,” voting often gets pushed aside for the urgent in our lives. **But it’s the great thing we get to do in America – hire and fire our government officials**. And I want to hire as many leaders who are going to support my family’s Christian values – for the sake of my kids and their future.
If you didn’t know, **November 7 is an important voting day in Virginia.**
On that day, you get to hire your next governor, as well as legislators in the Virginia House of Delegates.
[That’s why I’m asking you to pledge to stand and vote on Tues, Nov. 7.](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fpledge&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171011_va_e1&n=1)
Gov. Mike Huckabee recently joined My Faith Votes as our Honorary National Chairman. He simplified our goal to this: to see every single Christian in America – and in Virginia – show up for every election and make their voices heard. Imagine the impact on our communities if we make that happen!
Peter, please don’t pass up this opportunity to stand for biblical principles and hire leaders who will do the same.
| [I will vote ►](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fpledge&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171011_va_e1&n=2)

name: Democrats.org
subject: Trump's anti-women campaign continues, Derek
body:
Women's rights are human rights.
---
**Pitch in $3 or more to help elect Democrats who will fight to protect women's rights.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523b5e/4067b0a/3b0d354f0/7e65251a/1730753154/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171011_joc2_nd&source=em_20171011_joc2_nd&refcode=em_20171011_joc2_nd")**

The GOP is attacking women's reproductive rights on all sides, Derek.

Last Wednesday, House Republicans voted along party lines to pass a nationwide ban on abortions after 20 weeks -- a completely arbitrary move that ignores medical precedent for the sake of appeasing fringe members of their base. Then on Friday, the Trump administration rolled back the Affordable Care Act mandate that requires employers to cover birth control for their employees.

**[Enough.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523b5e/4067b0a/3b0d354f0/7e65251b/1730753154/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Enough&utm_campaign=em_20171011_joc2_nd&source=em_20171011_joc2_nd&refcode=em_20171011_joc2_nd")**

It's been over 40 years since the Supreme Court issued its landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision. Since then, we've worked to empower women instead of limiting their options.

Medical professionals have produced long-acting and oral contraceptives that are safer and more reliable than ever before. And thanks to the Affordable Care Act, more than 55 million American women have cost-free access to birth control -- saving women an average of $250 per year.

But conservatives in Congress, statehouses across the country, and now the White House are obsessed with taking us backward. They've convinced themselves that their beliefs about what a woman should do with her body are more important than freedom as it has been defined by our country's courts and laws.

We have to fight back.

I'm absolutely proud to toe the line with Democrats who will do whatever it takes to protect women's rights, Derek. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can if you're ready to do the same.

name: Hillsdale College
subject: Our gift to you
body:
Hillsdale College

 

Fellow American,

One of the greatest gifts God has given Americans is our freedom. Even with all the turmoil and oppression we see in the world around us, we still too often take these freedoms for granted.

In our great country, the Constitution is the document that protects it. After the Bible, it is the single most important document in the world. Most Americans think they know it well, since they learned about it in school.

But far too few Americans truly understand the Constitution and the freedoms it protects.

We’ve made our renowned Constitution 101 course free for all Americans to take online — the same course that every Hillsdale student must take to graduate, regardless of their major.

Activate your personal Constitution 101 course today — you’ll get weekly lessons via email and can take quizzes to test your knowledge as you learn.

Time is Running Out

Rush Limbaugh and Mark Levin agree:

“Hillsdale College is the authority on teaching the Constitution.”

In the fight to preserve our freedoms, our greatest enemy is ignorance. Become an expert on the document that secures and preserves your freedom — the U.S. Constitution.

Start your free Constitution 101 course today.

Thank you,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

Hillsdale College   33 East College St    Hillsdale,  MI   49242   USA

subject: #breastcancerawarenessmonth
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| This month marks Breast Cancer Awareness Month, friend. As a survivor and a legislator, I consider it my responsibility to share my story and to help make resources available for those in need. In 2007, I received the scariest news of my life. After I had discovered a lump, a doctor confirmed what I feared. I was 41, a proud mother of three, and I had just received news that I had a malignant tumor. I was shocked. I thought I was too young for such a diagnosis. Only later I learned that I carried a mutation of the BRCA2 gene, a mutation that's responsible for an increased risk of the disease and is five times more common in Ashkenazi Jewish women. Thankfully, through early detection and amazing care over the course of seven surgeries, I was declared cancer-free and have been ever since. My experience taught me how important life-saving awareness is. That's why I introduced the EARLY Act, a law that creates an education and outreach campaign to help young women under 45, and women at higher risk, understand their breast cancer risk. It's also why I'll never stop fighting Republican efforts to defund Planned Parenthood - making it harder for women to afford cancer screenings, preventive care, STI testing, and contraception - or GOP efforts to repeal the Affordable Care Act. When your doctor tells you that you have a serious illness, the last thing you need to worry about is how you'll afford quality care. If you lose your job and you have a pre-existing condition, the last thing you should worry about is whether or not you'll be able to get coverage in the future. The Affordable Care Act alleviates those fears. We've stopped the latest efforts by Republicans to repeal the ACA and defund Planned Parenthood -- but there are sure to be more. And each time they renew their attack on women's health, we will stand strong and protect our care. [_**Add your name to mine in support of protecting access to health care for women. And if you 'd like, be sure to share your story about how these issues - breast cancer and access to care - have impacted you and your family.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e10/622b7b5b/6952d7e/307bd285/3065394115/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171010m") Thank you, Debbie |

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6230/24c69fd9/8a96e637/189d2551/787325630/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ12N_digital_email_20171011_WinsSoFar_inact&source=WQEFEJ12N_digital_email_20171011_WinsSoFar_inact")

Peter,

Elections don't just happen every four years.

They happen all the time, and EMILY's List women always rise to the occasion.

Since November, more than 18,000 women have reached out to us about running for office. And this year, we've already endorsed 78 women running for office.

We're really proud of those numbers. You know what else we're proud of? Our victories.

We've already helped five EMILY's List women win their special elections. And we're ready to see this number grow even bigger!

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to every level of government.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6230/24c69fd9/8a96e637/189d2552/787325630/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171010_WinsSoFar?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ12N_digital_email_20171011_WinsSoFar_inact&source=WQEFEJ12N_digital_email_20171011_WinsSoFar_inact")**

Last month, we saw Annette Taddeo flip a Florida Senate seat from red to blue. And in February, just after Donald Trump's inauguration, Stephanie Hansen inspired hope when she won her special election for the Delaware Senate, maintaining its Democratic majority. And we have even more wins already under our belt, including Cindy Friedman (MA-SD Fourth Middlesex District), Jennifer McClellan (VA-SD09), and Christine Pellegrino (NY-HD09).

But we're not done yet! We have even more women running in elections in Virginia and Washington State next month that need our help, too.

**Donate $3 to bolster their campaigns and help elect even more pro-choice Democratic women like Annette, Stephanie, Cindy, Jennifer, and Christine:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Win-Even-More](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6230/24c69fd9/8a96e637/189d2553/787325630/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171010_WinsSoFar?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWinEvenMore&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ12N_digital_email_20171011_WinsSoFar_inact&source=WQEFEJ12N_digital_email_20171011_WinsSoFar_inact")**

Thank you,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List
